results.matched_effect_cluster: AuditableLLM hash-chain tamper-evident edit audit trail
results.justification: AuditableLLM is DIRECT TWIN — hash-chain-backed tamper-evident audit trail for adaptation/update/unlearning records each update — exactly the append-only visible patch registry of KINTSUGI-PATCH with cryptographic provenance.
EditScope formalises tracing + reversing edits using only model weights — direct support for KINTSUGI-PATCH's reversibility and trace requirements (sans the explicit registry).
EditMark embeds provenance-marking watermark directly into model weights via editing — KINTSUGI-PATCH's seam-visible marker, but as watermark.
LarQL SHOW patches gives an auditable record of every fact changed in a model — DIRECT TWIN of patch registry.
Comprehensive KE survey covers the design space including ROME/MEMIT with bookkeeping.
Massive-scale edits but no registry/audit angle.
EasyEdit 2.0 supports real-time inference-time steering — partial coverage of inference-time exposure of edits.
